    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InetAddressValidator
    StringValidator.asInetAddress()
    Ensures that the actual value contains a valid Internet address format.
    InetAddressValidator
    InetAddressValidator.isIpV4()
    Ensures that the actual value is an IP v4 address.
    InetAddressValidator

    Ensures that the actual value is an IP v6 address.

    Class
    Description
    final class 
    InetAddressValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of InetAddressValidator.
    final class 
    InetAddressValidatorNoOp
    An InetAddressValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
